# shm-anomaly-detection

This file will become your README and also the index of your

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install shm_anomaly_detection in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure shm_anomaly_detection package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to shm_anomaly_detection
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/justforprogramming07-code/shm-anomaly-detection):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/justforprogramming07-code/shm-anomaly-detection.git
```

or from
[conda](https://anaconda.org/justforprogramming07-code/shm-anomaly-detection)

``` sh
$ conda install -c justforprogramming07-code shm_anomaly_detection
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/shm-anomaly-detection/)

``` sh
$ pip install shm_anomaly_detection
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/justforprogramming07-code/shm-anomaly-detection)’s
[pages](https://justforprogramming07-code.github.io/shm-anomaly-detection/).
Additionally you can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/justforprogramming07-code/shm-anomaly-detection)
and [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/shm-anomaly-detection/)
respectively.
